dimension: SwapsApiService core HTTP-client layer (constructor/instantiation, all public methods + endpoint mapping, api-utils fetch/valibot/Result/error mapping, apiConfig URL resolution, submit-tx state machine) on origin/feat/swaps-api-v2

files_read.role: The HTTP client class under study. Implements ResultifiedSwapsApiV2 (mapped ISwapsApiV2). 21 public endpoint methods + private request<S>() + setHeaders/getBaseURL utilities.
Shared low-level fetch primitive: makeRequest<T>(MakeRequestParams) + toJsonBody (bigint-safe JSON). Also defines RequestConfig / RequestOverrideConfig / ApiResponse / MakeRequestParams types.
Resolves the ApiConfig union into concrete BaseApiConfig/SwapsApiConfig. isCustomApiConfig + layerConfigs + resolveBaseApiConfig + resolveSwapsApiConfig.

Barrel: re-exports RequestConfig/RequestOverrideConfig/ApiResponse TYPES from api-utils, plus everything from BackendApiService.js and SwapsApiService.js. makeRequest/toJsonBody stay package-internal.

Parent service. Now owns `public readonly swaps: SwapsApiService`, instantiates it with resolveSwapsApiConfig(config), shares the same request<S>()/toExternalApiError pattern, fans setHeaders out to swaps. Removed old submitSwapTx/getSubmitSwapTxStatus (moved to swaps v2).
Valibot response schemas, one per V2 response. Tx-bearing responses are make*ResponseSchema(txSchema) factories; submit-tx schemas SubmitTxResponseSchema + SubmitTxStatusResponseSchema.

Per-chain unsigned-tx wire→domain valibot schemas + rawTxSchemaForChainKey(chainKey): GenericSchema<unknown, RawTxReturnType> selector (EVM/Solana/Sui/Stellar/Injective/Icon/Stacks/Near + AnyRawTxSchema fallback).
Tests makeRequest DIRECTLY (URL/header/timeout precedence, method/body forwarding, 3 throw paths) and toJsonBody bigint serialization.

Tests via `new Sodax()` + vi.stubGlobal('fetch'). 21 endpoint routing cases asserting exact path+verb, happy paths, bigint body serialization, valibot validation failures, error propagation, RequestOverrideConfig.

Canonical V2 type vocabulary: ISwapsApiV2 interface (one method per route, post-serialization wire shapes), all *RequestV2/*ResponseV2 types incl. SubmitTxRequestV2/SubmitTxResponseV2/SubmitTxStatusQueryV2/SubmitTxStatusResponseV2.
SodaxError<C> class: constructor(code, message, {feature, cause?, context?}), toJSON serializer, isSodaxError guard.
Facade wiring: this.backendApi = new BackendApiService(this.instanceConfig.api, logger); this.api = this.backendApi — so reachable as sodax.api.swaps.*
Frontend mutation hook wrapping sodax.api.swaps.submitTx via useSafeMutation (retry:3, unwrapResult).
Frontend polling hook wrapping sodax.api.swaps.getSubmitTxStatus via useQuery (refetchInterval 1000ms, stops on executed/failed, retry:3, enabled when txHash+srcChainKey present).

key_findings: CLASS DECLARATION: `export class SwapsApiService implements ResultifiedSwapsApiV2`. The implemented type is a mapped type, NOT the raw interface: `type ResultifiedSwapsApiV2 = { [K in keyof ISwapsApiV2]: ISwapsApiV2[K] extends (...args: infer A) => Promise<infer R> ? (...args: [...A, config?: RequestOverrideConfig]) => Promise<Result<R>> : never; }`. This auto-derives the class surface from the canonical `ISwapsApiV2` (in @sodax/types) by adding a trailing optional `config?: RequestOverrideConfig` to every method and wrapping the return in `Promise<Result<T>>`. The service never throws.

PRIVATE FIELDS: `private readonly config: SwapsApiConfig; private readonly headers: Record<string,string>; private readonly logger: SodaxLogger;`. CONSTRUCTOR: `constructor(config: SwapsApiConfig, logger: SodaxLogger = consoleLogger)` → sets `this.config = config; this.headers = { ...config.headers }; this.logger = logger;`. CRITICAL: the constructor takes an ALREADY-RESOLVED `SwapsApiConfig` (flat {baseURL, timeout, headers}); it does NOT resolve the ApiConfig union itself — the parent BackendApiService resolves it via `resolveSwapsApiConfig(config)`.

INSTANTIATION CHAIN: Sodax facade (shared/entities/Sodax.ts): `this.backendApi = new BackendApiService(this.instanceConfig.api, logger); this.api = this.backendApi;` (`api` is syntactic sugar). BackendApiService constructor: `this.config = resolveBaseApiConfig(config); this.headers = {...this.config.headers}; this.logger = logger; this.swaps = new SwapsApiService(resolveSwapsApiConfig(config), this.logger);` with field `public readonly swaps: SwapsApiService;`. So the service is reachable as `sodax.api.swaps.<method>` (and `sodax.backendApi.swaps`).

PRIVATE REQUEST WRAPPER (the heart, every public method delegates to it): `private async request<S extends v.GenericSchema>(endpoint: string, config: RequestConfig, schema: S, overrideConfig?: RequestOverrideConfig): Promise<Result<v.InferOutput<S>, SodaxError<'EXTERNAL_API_ERROR'>>>`. Body: try { const raw = await makeRequest<unknown>({ endpoint, config: { baseURL: this.config.baseURL, timeout: this.config.timeout, headers: this.headers, ...config }, overrideConfig, logger: this.logger }); const parsed = v.safeParse(schema, raw); if (!parsed.success) return { ok:false, error: new SodaxError('EXTERNAL_API_ERROR', `Invalid response shape from swaps API for ${endpoint}`, { feature:'backend', context:{ api:'backend', endpoint, reason:'invalid_response_shape', issues: v.flatten(parsed.issues) } }) }; return { ok:true, value: parsed.output }; } catch (error) { return { ok:false, error: new SodaxError('EXTERNAL_API_ERROR', error instanceof Error ? error.message : `Request to ${endpoint} failed`, { feature:'backend', cause:error, context:{ api:'backend', endpoint } }) }; }.

TWO DISTINCT FAILURE MODES in request<S>: (1) transport failure caught from makeRequest → SodaxError with `cause` set (carries HTTP_REQUEST_FAILED / REQUEST_TIMEOUT / network error), message = underlying error.message; (2) 2xx body that fails valibot → SodaxError with context.reason='invalid_response_shape' and context.issues=v.flatten(parsed.issues), NO cause. Both: code='EXTERNAL_API_ERROR', feature='backend', context.api='backend', context.endpoint=<endpoint>.

ALL 21 PUBLIC METHODS (name → HTTP verb path, body/query handling, valibot schema, return type). All return Promise<Result<T>> and accept trailing `config?: RequestOverrideConfig`: getTokens() → GET /swaps/tokens, GetSwapTokensResponseSchema → Result<GetSwapTokensResponseV2>. getTokensByChain(chainKey: string) → GET /swaps/tokens/${chainKey}, GetSwapTokensByChainResponseSchema → Result<GetSwapTokensByChainResponseV2>. getQuote(body: QuoteRequestV2, query?: QuoteQueryV2) → POST /swaps/quote (or /swaps/quote?includeTxData=true when query.includeTxData), body=toJsonBody(body), schema=makeQuoteResponseSchema(rawTxSchemaForChainKey(body.tokenSrcChainKey)) → Result<QuoteResponseV2>. getDeadline(query?: DeadlineQueryV2) → GET /swaps/deadline(?offsetSeconds=N), DeadlineResponseSchema → Result<DeadlineResponseV2>.

PUBLIC METHODS cont'd: checkAllowance(body: CreateIntentParamsV2) → POST /swaps/allowance/check, toJsonBody, AllowanceCheckResponseSchema → Result<AllowanceCheckResponseV2>. approve(body: CreateIntentParamsV2) → POST /swaps/approve, toJsonBody, makeApproveResponseSchema(rawTxSchemaForChainKey(body.srcChainKey)) → Result<ApproveResponseV2>. createIntent(body: CreateIntentParamsV2) → POST /swaps/intents, toJsonBody, makeCreateIntentResponseSchema(rawTxSchemaForChainKey(body.srcChainKey)) → Result<CreateIntentResponseV2>.

PUBLIC METHODS cont'd (intent lifecycle): submitIntent(body: SubmitIntentRequestV2) → POST /swaps/intents/submit, toJsonBody, SubmitIntentResponseSchema → Result<SubmitIntentResponseV2>. getStatus(body: StatusRequestV2) → POST /swaps/intents/status, toJsonBody, StatusResponseSchema → Result<StatusResponseV2> ({status: -1|1|2|3|4, fillTxHash?}; codes = -1 NOT_FOUND,1 NOT_STARTED,2 STARTED,3 SOLVED,4 FAILED). cancelIntent(body: CancelIntentRequestV2) → POST /swaps/intents/cancel, toJsonBody, makeCancelIntentResponseSchema(rawTxSchemaForChainKey(body.srcChainKey)) → Result<CancelIntentResponseV2>. getIntentHash(body: IntentHashRequestV2) → POST /swaps/intents/hash, toJsonBody, IntentHashResponseSchema → Result<IntentHashResponseV2>. getSolvedIntentPacket(body: IntentPacketRequestV2) → POST /swaps/intents/packet (long-poll), toJsonBody, IntentPacketResponseSchema → Result<IntentPacketResponseV2>. getIntentSubmitTxExtraData(body: IntentExtraDataRequestV2) → POST /swaps/intents/extra-data, toJsonBody, RelayExtraDataResponseSchema → Result<IntentExtraDataResponseV2>. getFilledIntent(txHash: string) → GET /swaps/intents/${txHash}/fill, IntentStateResponseSchema → Result<IntentStateV2>. getIntent(txHash: string) → GET /swaps/intents/${txHash}, IntentResponseSchema → Result<GetIntentResponseV2>.

PUBLIC METHODS cont'd (limit orders/gas/fees): createLimitOrderIntent(body: CreateLimitOrderParamsV2) → POST /swaps/limit-orders, toJsonBody, makeCreateIntentResponseSchema(rawTxSchemaForChainKey(body.srcChainKey)) → Result<CreateLimitOrderResponseV2>. estimateGas(body: GasEstimateRequestV2) → POST /swaps/gas/estimate, toJsonBody, GasEstimateResponseSchema → Result<GasEstimateResponseV2>. getPartnerFee(query: FeeQueryV2) → GET /swaps/fees/partner?amount=<query.amount> (URLSearchParams), FeeResponseSchema → Result<FeeResponseV2>. getSolverFee(query: FeeQueryV2) → GET /swaps/fees/solver?amount=<query.amount>, FeeResponseSchema → Result<FeeResponseV2>.

SUBMIT-TX STATE MACHINE (the central submit+poll pattern, last 2 endpoint methods): submitTx(body: SubmitTxRequestV2) → POST /swaps/submit-tx, body=toJsonBody(body), SubmitTxResponseSchema → Result<SubmitTxResponseV2>. Doc: 'Submit a swap transaction to be processed (relay, post-execution, etc.). Idempotent on (txHash, srcChainKey).' SubmitTxRequestV2 = { txHash: string; srcChainKey: string; walletAddress: string; intent: IntentRequestV2 (bigint fields, serialized by toJsonBody); relayData: string }. SubmitTxResponseV2 = { success: boolean; data: { status: 'inserted'|'duplicate'; message: string } }.

SUBMIT-TX STATUS POLL: getSubmitTxStatus(query: SubmitTxStatusQueryV2) → GET /swaps/submit-tx/status?txHash=<>&srcChainKey=<> (built with `new URLSearchParams({ txHash: query.txHash, srcChainKey: query.srcChainKey })`), SubmitTxStatusResponseSchema → Result<SubmitTxStatusResponseV2>. SubmitTxStatusQueryV2 = { txHash: string; srcChainKey: string } (BOTH required). SubmitTxStatusResponseV2 = { success: boolean; data: SubmitTxStatusDataV2 } where SubmitTxStatusDataV2 = { txHash; srcChainKey; status: 'pending'|'relaying'|'relayed'|'posting_execution'|'executed'|'failed'; failedAtStep?; failureReason?; processingAttempts: number; abandonedAt?; result?: { dstIntentTxHash: string; packetData?: PacketDataV2 (snake_case fields); intent_hash? }; userMessage?; intentCancelled? }.

UTILITY METHODS (parity with BackendApiService): `public setHeaders(headers: Record<string,string>): void` → Object.entries(headers).forEach(([k,v]) => this.headers[k]=v) (merges, existing keys overwritten). `public getBaseURL(): string` → returns this.config.baseURL. NOTE: BackendApiService.setHeaders ALSO calls `this.swaps.setHeaders(headers)` so headers fan out to the sub-service (each sub-service holds its own header copy) — relevant for injecting auth/tracing tokens that must reach swaps.* calls.

api-utils makeRequest SIGNATURE: `export async function makeRequest<T>(params: MakeRequestParams): Promise<T>` where `MakeRequestParams = { endpoint: string; config: RequestConfig; overrideConfig?: RequestOverrideConfig; logger: SodaxLogger }`. URL: `baseURL = overrideConfig.baseURL || config.baseURL || ''` (TRUTHY fallback — empty-string override defers to default), `url = ${baseURL}${endpoint}`. Headers: `{ ...config.headers, ...overrideConfig.headers }` (override wins per key). Timeout: `overrideConfig.timeout ?? config.timeout ?? DEFAULT_BACKEND_API_TIMEOUT` (NULLISH fallback), enforced via AbortController + setTimeout(()=>controller.abort(), timeout), cleared with clearTimeout on both success and error paths.

api-utils makeRequest THROW PATHS (it throws; the service request<S> catches): on `!response.ok` → reads response.text() then `throw new Error('HTTP_REQUEST_FAILED', { cause: new Error(`HTTP ${status}: ${text}`) })`. On AbortError (timeout) → `throw new Error('REQUEST_TIMEOUT', { cause: new Error(`Request timeout after ${timeout}ms`) })`. Other Error → logged via logger.error('[BackendApiService] Request error', error) then re-thrown verbatim (preserves network errors). Non-Error rejection → logged then `throw new Error('UNKNOWN_REQUEST_ERROR', { cause: error })`. On success: `return await response.json()`.

api-utils toJsonBody: `export const toJsonBody = (value: unknown): string => JSON.stringify(value, (_key, val) => (typeof val === 'bigint' ? val.toString() : val))`. Bigint-safe serializer — used as the `body` for EVERY POST method whose payload may contain bigint (intent structs). Plain JSON.stringify throws TypeError on bigint. GET methods use URLSearchParams instead.

api-utils EXPORTED TYPES: `RequestConfig = { method: 'GET'|'POST'|'PUT'|'DELETE'; headers?: Record<string,string>; body?: string; timeout?: number; baseURL?: string }`. `RequestOverrideConfig = { baseURL?: string; timeout?: number; headers?: Record<string,string> }`. `ApiResponse<T> = { data: T; status: number; message?: string }`. index.ts re-exports ApiResponse/RequestConfig/RequestOverrideConfig as TYPES (consumed by @sodax/dapp-kit); makeRequest/toJsonBody are package-internal.

apiConfig RESOLUTION: `isCustomApiConfig(config): config is CustomApiConfig` = `'baseApiConfig' in config || 'swapsApiConfig' in config`. `layerConfigs(...slices: Array<Partial<BaseApiConfig>|undefined>): BaseApiConfig` reduces slices left→right over defaults: baseURL `slice.baseURL ?? acc.baseURL`, timeout `slice.timeout ?? acc.timeout`, headers `{...acc.headers, ...slice.headers}` (merged); seed = { baseURL: DEFAULT_BACKEND_API_ENDPOINT, timeout: DEFAULT_BACKEND_API_TIMEOUT, headers: {...DEFAULT_BACKEND_API_HEADERS} }. `resolveBaseApiConfig(config)`: flat → layerConfigs(config); custom → layerConfigs(config.baseApiConfig). `resolveSwapsApiConfig(config)`: flat → layerConfigs(config) (SHARED with base — swaps endpoints are /swaps/* sub-paths under the same base URL); custom → layerConfigs(config.baseApiConfig, config.swapsApiConfig) (swaps layered OVER base OVER defaults).

ENVIRONMENT/URL behaviour: there is NO mainnet/testnet branching in this layer. The base URL is a single constant DEFAULT_BACKEND_API_ENDPOINT='https://api.sodax.com/v1/be' (DEFAULT_BACKEND_API_TIMEOUT=30000ms, DEFAULT_BACKEND_API_HEADERS={'Content-Type':'application/json','Accept':'application/json'}). 'Per environment' = the SDK consumer passes a custom ApiConfig at `new Sodax({ api: ... })` construction (flat BaseApiConfig override, or nested CustomApiConfig to point base vs swaps at different hosts), OR overrides per-call via the trailing RequestOverrideConfig (baseURL/timeout/headers).

CONFIG TYPES (constants.ts): `BaseApiConfig = { baseURL: HttpUrl; timeout: number; headers: Record<string,string> }`; `SwapsApiConfig = BaseApiConfig` (alias); `CustomApiConfig = { baseApiConfig: BaseApiConfig; swapsApiConfig?: SwapsApiConfig } | { baseApiConfig?: BaseApiConfig; swapsApiConfig: SwapsApiConfig }` (at least one slice required); `ApiConfig = BaseApiConfig | CustomApiConfig`. The union is discriminated by presence of baseApiConfig/swapsApiConfig keys.

SCHEMA FACTORY PATTERN (swapsApiSchemas.ts): tx-bearing responses are FACTORIES taking the per-chain tx schema: makeCreateIntentResponseSchema(txSchema) = v.object({ tx: txSchema, intent: IntentResponseSchema, relayData: RelayExtraDataResponseSchema }); makeApproveResponseSchema(txSchema) = v.object({ tx: txSchema }); makeCancelIntentResponseSchema(txSchema) = v.object({ tx: txSchema }); makeQuoteResponseSchema(txSchema) = v.object({ quotedAmount: v.string(), txData: v.optional(makeCreateIntentResponseSchema(txSchema)) }). Plain schemas: SubmitTxResponseSchema = v.object({ success: v.boolean(), data: v.object({ status: v.picklist(['inserted','duplicate']), message: v.string() }) }); SubmitTxStatusResponseSchema = v.object({ success: v.boolean(), data: SubmitTxStatusDataSchema }). All bigint-derived fields are v.string() (decimal strings on the wire).

rawTxSchemaForChainKey(chainKey: string): v.GenericSchema<unknown, RawTxReturnType> — selects per-chain unsigned-tx schema via getChainType(chainKey) (try/catch → undefined → AnyRawTxSchema fallback). Cases: EVM/SOLANA/SUI/STELLAR/INJECTIVE/ICON/STACKS/NEAR. These schemas TRANSFORM wire→domain: decimal-string numerics → bigint via `v.pipe(v.string(), v.toBigint())`, Injective index-object bytes → Uint8Array. NEVER throws (preserves never-throw contract). Used because the POST body carries the source chain key so the response tx can be validated to the exact chain variant.

SodaxError CONSTRUCTOR: `new SodaxError<C>(code: C, message: string, options: { feature: SodaxFeature; cause?: unknown; context?: SodaxErrorContext })`. Fields: code, feature, cause, context. For the API layer: code='EXTERNAL_API_ERROR', feature='backend', context.api='backend'. codes.ts: SodaxErrorCode union includes 'EXTERNAL_API_ERROR'; SodaxErrorContext.api is typed `'solver' | 'backend'` (no 'bridge' value yet); SodaxFeature includes 'backend'. isSodaxError(e) is the bundle-safe guard.
Result<T> wrapping: every method returns `{ ok: true; value: T } | { ok: false; error: SodaxError<'EXTERNAL_API_ERROR'> }` (Result type from @sodax/types). The service NEVER throws and NEVER rejects.

FRONTEND CONSUME PATTERN (dapp-kit): submit = `useSwapsApiSubmitTx` — useSafeMutation({ mutationKey:['swapsApi','submitTx'], retry:3, mutationFn: async ({request, apiConfig}) => unwrapResult(await sodax.api.swaps.submitTx(request, apiConfig)) }); vars type UseSwapsApiSubmitTxVars = { request: SubmitTxRequestV2; apiConfig?: RequestOverrideConfig }. poll = `useSwapsApiSubmitTxStatus` — useQuery({ queryKey:['swapsApi','submitTx','status',txHash,srcChainKey], queryFn: () => unwrapResult(await sodax.api.swaps.getSubmitTxStatus({txHash,srcChainKey}, apiConfig)), enabled: !!txHash && txHash.length>0 && !!srcChainKey, retry:3, refetchInterval: q => { const s=q.state.data?.data?.status; return (s==='executed'||s==='failed') ? false : 1000 } }). unwrapResult converts Result<T> → T-or-throw at the hook boundary.

PRODUCT FLOW the submit-tx endpoints enable: backend uses createIntent/approve/cancelIntent to build RAW UNSIGNED txs (the tx is validated+transformed by rawTxSchemaForChainKey); frontend signs+broadcasts via wallet extension to get a real txHash, then calls submitTx({txHash, srcChainKey, walletAddress, intent, relayData}) to hand it to the backend relay pipeline, then polls getSubmitTxStatus until status is 'executed' (success, result.dstIntentTxHash present) or 'failed'. This is the 'submit tx to API + poll status' state machine.

TEST HARNESS PATTERN: SwapsApiService.test.ts uses a module-scope `const sodax = new Sodax()` and `vi.stubGlobal('fetch', mockFetch)`. Helpers: okResponse(data)={ok:true,status:200,json:vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(data)}, httpErrorResponse(status,text), abortFetchImpl. Coverage groups: (1) endpoint routing — 21 cases asserting exact URL `${BASE}/swaps/...` + method; (2) happy paths asserting {ok:true,value}; (3) bigint body serialization (asserts JSON.parse(body).intent.intentId==='123456789'); (4) validation failures asserting {ok:false} with SodaxError code='EXTERNAL_API_ERROR', context.reason='invalid_response_shape'; (5) error propagation (HTTP/timeout/network); (6) RequestOverrideConfig baseURL override. BASE = DEFAULT_BACKEND_API_ENDPOINT. api-utils.test.ts tests makeRequest+toJsonBody directly via a `run()` adapter that injects silentLogger.
replication_recipe: 1. TYPES (packages/types/src/backend/backendApiV2.ts or a new bridgeApiV2.ts): define the canonical `IBridgeApiV2` interface — one async method per bridge endpoint, fields typed as POST-SERIALIZATION wire shapes (bigint/Date → decimal/ISO string). Define each `*RequestV2`/`*ResponseV2`/`*QueryV2` type. If Bridge has a submit+poll flow, mirror SubmitTxRequestV2 / SubmitTxResponseV2 / SubmitTxStatusQueryV2 / SubmitTxStatusResponseV2 exactly (txHash/srcChainKey/walletAddress + status enums). Export all from the types barrel.

2. SCHEMAS (packages/sdk/src/backendApi/bridgeApiSchemas.ts): one valibot schema per IBridgeApiV2 response, mirroring swapsApiSchemas.ts. All bigint-derived wire fields = v.string(). For any tx-bearing bridge response, REUSE the make*ResponseSchema(txSchema) factory pattern and the existing `rawTxSchemaForChainKey` from rawTxSchemas.ts (do NOT duplicate raw-tx schemas — import them). Reuse RelayExtraDataResponseSchema/IntentResponseSchema from swapsApiSchemas if shapes match.

3. SERVICE (packages/sdk/src/backendApi/BridgeApiService.ts): define `type ResultifiedBridgeApiV2 = { [K in keyof IBridgeApiV2]: IBridgeApiV2[K] extends (...args: infer A) => Promise<infer R> ? (...args: [...A, config?: RequestOverrideConfig]) => Promise<Result<R>> : never }` and `export class BridgeApiService implements ResultifiedBridgeApiV2`. Private fields config/headers/logger identical to SwapsApiService. Constructor `(config: BridgeApiConfig, logger: SodaxLogger = consoleLogger)` taking an ALREADY-RESOLVED flat config.

4. SERVICE request<S> wrapper: copy SwapsApiService.request<S> VERBATIM (same body: makeRequest → v.safeParse → Result, two failure modes). Keep code='EXTERNAL_API_ERROR' and feature='backend'. For context.api: either reuse 'backend' (Bridge is served by the same backend API — no codes.ts change needed) or add a 'bridge' literal to SodaxErrorContext.api in errors/codes.ts (DECISION NEEDED — swaps reused 'backend'). Message templates: `Invalid response shape from bridge API for ${endpoint}`.

5. SERVICE public methods: one per IBridgeApiV2 route, each delegating to this.request(endpoint, { method, body? }, schema, config). POST bodies → `body: toJsonBody(body)` (bigint-safe, import from api-utils). GET query params → `new URLSearchParams({...})`. Path-param routes → template literals `/bridge/.../${id}`. Tx-bearing routes select schema via `makeXResponseSchema(rawTxSchemaForChainKey(body.srcChainKey))`. Add `setHeaders(headers)` and `getBaseURL()` utilities (copy verbatim).

6. CONFIG (packages/types/src/common/constants.ts + packages/sdk/src/backendApi/apiConfig.ts): DECIDE whether Bridge needs an independent endpoint. If yes: add `BridgeApiConfig = BaseApiConfig`, extend CustomApiConfig with optional `bridgeApiConfig?`, add `resolveBridgeApiConfig(config): BridgeApiConfig` = (flat → layerConfigs(config); custom → layerConfigs(config.baseApiConfig, config.bridgeApiConfig)) mirroring resolveSwapsApiConfig. If Bridge shares the base host under /bridge/* sub-paths (simplest, like swaps in flat mode): just reuse resolveBaseApiConfig / resolveSwapsApiConfig output and route under /bridge/*.

7. WIRE INTO BackendApiService.ts: add `public readonly bridge: BridgeApiService;` and in the constructor `this.bridge = new BridgeApiService(resolveBridgeApiConfig(config), this.logger);` (use resolveBaseApiConfig if sharing). In setHeaders, add `this.bridge.setHeaders(headers);` so auth/tracing headers fan out. No change to Sodax facade needed — `sodax.api.bridge.*` works automatically since `sodax.api = backendApi`.

9. TESTS (packages/sdk/src/backendApi/BridgeApiService.test.ts): mirror SwapsApiService.test.ts — module-scope `new Sodax()` + vi.stubGlobal('fetch'), an endpoint-routing case table asserting exact `${BASE}/bridge/...` URL + verb for every method, happy-path {ok:true,value} assertions, bigint body serialization assertions (if tx bodies), valibot validation-failure assertions (ok:false, SodaxError code='EXTERNAL_API_ERROR', context.reason='invalid_response_shape'), error-propagation (HTTP/timeout/network), and RequestOverrideConfig baseURL override.

10. FRONTEND HOOKS (packages/dapp-kit/src/hooks/bridgeApi/): if Bridge has a submit+poll flow, mirror useSwapsApiSubmitTx (useSafeMutation, retry:3, mutationFn = unwrapResult(await sodax.api.bridge.submitTx(request, apiConfig))) and useSwapsApiSubmitTxStatus (useQuery, refetchInterval 1000ms stopping on terminal status, retry:3, enabled gate on required query params, unwrapResult at the boundary). Vars carry { request, apiConfig?: RequestOverrideConfig }.
open_questions: Does Bridge get its own backend host (independent endpoint) requiring a new bridgeApiConfig slice in CustomApiConfig + resolveBridgeApiConfig, or does it share the base host under /bridge/* sub-paths like swaps does in flat-config mode? Swaps reuses the base URL when ApiConfig is flat and only diverges under CustomApiConfig — Bridge likely follows the same convention.

SodaxErrorContext.api is currently typed `'solver' | 'backend'` (errors/codes.ts:127). SwapsApiService reused 'backend'. Confirm whether Bridge should also reuse feature='backend'/api='backend' (no codes.ts change) or introduce a dedicated 'bridge' feature/api literal — the former matches the swaps precedent.

What is the actual Bridge endpoint surface (route list + verbs + request/response shapes)? This digest documents the SwapsApiService PATTERN; the concrete IBridgeApiV2 method set must come from the Bridge backend API spec / issue #255, not inferred from swaps.

Does Bridge have a submit-tx + status-poll state machine analogous to /swaps/submit-tx and /swaps/submit-tx/status (and the corresponding frontend submit/poll hooks), or a different lifecycle? The submit+poll-until-terminal pattern is the most reusable piece and should be confirmed against the Bridge product flow.
